title: Rain World Weaponry
description: Adds four throwable weapons from the game Rain World
body:
Adds The Weaponry from Rain World 

Four Throwable Weapons

- Rubbish/Rock
 
 Deals a small amount of damage hitting a entity, drops on impact
  
 Recipe - Any stone
 
- Spear
 
 Deals a decent amount of damage hitting a entity, drops on impact

 Recipe - 3 Iron in a diaganal

- Grenade
 
 Deals a big amount of damage hitting a entity, explodes on impact
 
 Recipe - A Rubish/Rock surrounded by TNT
 
- Explosive Spear

Deals a huge amount of damage hitting a entity, explodes on impact

Recipe - A Spear next to a TNT
